Aspirational Rationality is a form of Rationality with an aspirational form, first proposed by [[Agnes Callard]]<ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-45-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-the-nature-of-wisdom/</ref><ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VUNJF01NQHY&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=52</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Aspirational rationality]][[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Aspirational rationality]][[Category:Agape]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Aspirational rationality]][[sn:Aspirational rationality]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
